youtube_media.title: 12 Days Out From My Kamil Rematch | Numbers Don't Lie
youtube_media.summary:
Head to https://huel.yt.link/7S8IDjk
 and use MONSTER15 to get 15% off orders $50+. New customers only!
This video includes a paid partnership with Huel. #ad

I’m 12 days out from my rematch with Kamil Jablonski.

This isn’t a hype session. It’s a strength test against numbers I set weeks ago during training camp to make sure I’m prepared for this armwrestling match.

Every lift in this video has a benchmark attached to it. Either it shows up — or it doesn’t. That’s how I remove guesswork before competition.

I’ve pulled Kamil before and won 3–0. But I expect a stronger, more prepared opponent this time. Nothing gets left to chance.

These lifts include:
• Shoulder press
• Seated pronation
• Riser curl
• Pronation-engaged back pressure
• Outside side pressure
• Wrist cupping

This is what preparation looks like when numbers don’t lie.
